name: rabbitmq.connection.current
definition: Current open AMQP connections on broker scope. Use against connection.max for utilisation.
absence_means: No broker telemetry or no active clients
cardinality_footguns: Safe when bounded by node top N

name: rabbitmq.connection.max
definition: Configured connection ceiling used as denominator for connection utilisation.
absence_means: Metric absent or limits not exposed

name: rabbitmq.channel.current
definition: Current open channels across tracked RabbitMQ scope.
absence_means: No broker telemetry or no active channels

name: rabbitmq.channel.max
definition: Configured channel ceiling used as denominator for channel utilisation.
absence_means: Metric absent or limits not exposed

name: rabbitmq.message.published
definition: Messages published into broker and queue surfaces. Primary ingress workload counter.
absence_means: No publishes in range or ingestion gap
cardinality_footguns: Queue names can be high cardinality so always bound top N

name: rabbitmq.message.delivered
definition: Messages delivered from queues to consumers. Primary egress workload counter.
absence_means: No deliveries in range or ingestion gap
cardinality_footguns: Queue names can be high cardinality so always bound top N

name: rabbitmq.message.current
definition: Current queue message depth across state dimensions. Backlog indicator.
absence_means: No queued messages or telemetry not reporting
cardinality_footguns: Queue dimension is high cardinality so bound and prefer top-list for breadth

name: rabbitmq.consumer.count
definition: Total number of consumers observed in metric scope.
absence_means: No active consumers or collector gap
cardinality_footguns: Queue-level split can be large in multi-tenant fleets

name: rabbitmq.disk.free
definition: Free disk bytes against broker-level threshold. Critical saturation guardrail.
optional_context_fields: Metric missing or node not scraped
absence_means: Safe

name: rabbitmq.disk.limit
definition: Disk free floor that triggers protective behavior when crossed.
absence_means: Metric missing or limit not exposed

name: rabbitmq.queue.consumer.count
definition: Consumer count per queue. Useful for ownership and skew checks.
absence_means: No queue-tagged telemetry or no consumers

name: rabbitmq.queue.consumer.utilisation
definition: Queue consumer utilisation ratio between 0 and 1 where lower suggests slower consumers.
absence_means: Queue utilisation dimension unavailable or no active consumers

name: rabbitmq.node.consumer.count
definition: Consumer count rolled up by node for hotspot detection.
absence_means: No consumers or node dimension missing

name: rabbitmq.node.consumer.utilisation
definition: Node-level consumer utilisation ratio for broad health checks.
absence_means: No consumers or utilisation dimension absent

name: rabbitmq.node.disk.free
definition: Node disk free bytes for multi-node headroom comparison.
absence_means: Node metric missing

name: rabbitmq.node.disk.free.limit
definition: Node disk free limit bytes for alarm headroom math.
absence_means: Safe

name: rabbitmq.node.file_descriptors
definition: Current file descriptor usage by node runtime.
absence_means: Node metric missing

name: rabbitmq.node.file_descriptors.limit
definition: Node file descriptor limit used for utilisation denominator.
absence_means: Node limit metric missing

name: rabbitmq.node.message.published
definition: Node-level published message counter useful for node skew analysis.
absence_means: No node-level publish telemetry

name: rabbitmq.node.message.delivered
definition: Node-level delivered message counter for egress skew analysis.
absence_means: No node-level delivery telemetry

name: rabbitmq.node.message.acknowledged
definition: Node-level acknowledgement counter indicating successful consumer processing completions.
absence_means: No ack telemetry or no successful processing

name: rabbitmq.node.message.confirmed
definition: Node-level publisher confirm counter indicating broker acknowledgement back to publishers.
absence_means: No confirm telemetry or confirms not enabled in clients

name: rabbitmq.node.message.current
definition: Node-level queued message depth counter-like sum used for per-node backlog pressure.
absence_means: No queued messages or node metric absent

name: rabbitmq.node.message.redelivered
definition: Node-level redelivery counter showing retries and possible processing failure loops.
absence_means: No redeliveries or telemetry absent

name: rabbitmq.node.processes
definition: Current Erlang process usage at node level.
absence_means: Node process telemetry missing

name: rabbitmq.node.processes.limit
definition: Node Erlang process limit denominator for saturation ratio.
absence_means: Node process limit metric missing

name: rabbitmq.node.sock_descriptors
definition: Current socket descriptor usage at node level.
absence_means: Node socket telemetry missing

name: rabbitmq.node.sock_descriptors.limit
definition: Node socket descriptor limit denominator for saturation ratio.
absence_means: Node socket limit metric missing

name: rabbitmq.node.queue.count
definition: Number of queues hosted on each node used for backlog normalization and topology pressure.
absence_means: No node queue telemetry

name: rabbitmq.node.disk.io.read
definition: Node disk read bytes counter associated with broker I/O pressure and paging behavior.
absence_means: Node disk read telemetry missing

name: rabbitmq.node.disk.io.write
definition: Node disk write bytes counter associated with persistence and queue churn load.
absence_means: Node disk write telemetry missing

name: rabbitmq.message.ready
definition: Messages immediately available for delivery from queues.
absence_means: No ready backlog or metric unavailable
cardinality_footguns: Service instance IDs can be high cardinality; always bound top N

name: rabbitmq.message.unacked
definition: Messages delivered but not yet acknowledged by consumers.
absence_means: No in-flight backlog or metric unavailable
cardinality_footguns: Service instance IDs can be high cardinality; always bound top N

name: NOT_APPLICABLE
definition: RabbitMQ broker telemetry does not expose direct billing metrics; use resource proxies like disk IO descriptor utilisation and queue depth to estimate operational cost pressure.
